title: Add Gemini proposal-only review lane
goal: Define and test a Gemini review/scout lane that consumes bounded context without sensitive values and returns structured proposal-only findings or patch suggestions.

metadata.safety_boundary: proposal-only review lane after preflight; no push, merge, runtime mutation, repository mutation by Gemini, credential exposure, automatic dispatch, or queue mutation
metadata.ordering_note: Execution order is governed by depends_on; this task remains blocked until T008 is accepted.
metadata.outcome: Bureau PR #244 added bureau-gemini-review-lane as a proposal-only external review lane. It accepts only explicit bounded diff and optional brief artifacts, rejects oversized or secret-like inputs, invokes Gemini as --sandbox --print from an empty temporary directory, parses only proposal/blocked/no_action JSON statuses, and keeps all write/push/merge/runtime/credential/dispatch/queue/lane-activation effect flags false.

verified_acceptance.briefing-schema: docs/gemini-proposal-review-lane-v1.md and src/bureau/gemini_review_lane.py define allowed scope, forbidden authority, input artifacts, output schema, max bytes and no-credential/no-push/no-merge/no-runtime constraints.
verified_acceptance.output-schema: tests/test_gemini_review_lane.py covers proposal JSON, non-JSON blocking and allowed statuses proposal, blocked and no_action.
verified_acceptance.sandbox-boundary: The tool invokes Gemini with --sandbox --print from an empty temporary directory and receipts keep all effect flags false.
verified_acceptance.human-or-grabowski-gate: The lane returns proposal-only receipts; it never applies patches and marks suggestions as evidence for Grabowski or human review only.
verified_acceptance.preflight-required: PR #242 recorded auth/model/generation readiness while keeping laneEnabled false before PR #244 implemented the lane.

checks: Bureau PR #244 validate (3.10) SUCCESS before merge
Bureau PR #244 validate (3.12) SUCCESS before merge
local: ruff check src tests pyproject.toml OK
local: live smoke with synthetic non-secret mini diff wrote docs/reports/gemini-review-lane-smoke-2026-07-08.json and returned no_action with all effect flags false

acceptance.assertion: Agent briefing requires allowed_scope, forbidden_changes, input_artifacts, output_schema, max_runtime and no-credential/no-push/no-merge/no-runtime-mutation constraints.
Gemini output is machine-readable and limited to proposal, blocked or no_action outcomes.
The lane does not grant write, push, merge, runtime or credential authority to Gemini.
Any patch proposal requires Grabowski or human review before effect.
The Gemini review lane is not active until the Gemini capability and sandbox preflight task is accepted.
